# split-large-code-notion
Description: Split large code or text into multiple Notion code blocks with continuity labels to bypass character limits.
Source: project
1. Identify the large code or text that exceeds the character limit for a single Notion block.
2. Divide the content into logical sections, each fitting within the character limit.
3. For each section, create a separate code block within Notion.
4. Add clear labels or notes to each block indicating its part in the sequence (e.g., "Part 1 of X", "Part 2 of X").
5. Include continuity notes, especially for subsequent blocks, to explain where the content continues from the previous block.
6. Ensure the labels and notes clearly indicate that the blocks belong together as a single, continuous piece of content.
